final:
module top_module(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output wire [3:0] count
);reg [3:0] count_reg;

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count_reg <= 4'b0;
    end else begin
        count_reg <= count_reg + 1;
    end
end

assign count = count_reg;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
